definition:
1. to unroll , (Euripides):metaphorically to unfold , Lat. explicare, (Euripides) 
2. of any rapid motion, ἴχνος ἐξ. ποδός to evolve the mazy  dance, (Euripides):—;hence intransitive to wheel about , (Plutarch) 
3. as military term, = ἀναπτύσσειν, Lat. explicare, to extend the front by bringing up the rear men, to deploy , (Xenophon Historicus) 
4. to draw off , (Plutarch) (ML)
